violations.text: The hand washing sink at the bar was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Cases of food were observed stored under a waste pipe in dry storage. Cases were on wheels and were moved from under pipe. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Reach-in freezer #3 located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Per PIC, unit stopped working yesterday, work order is in place. PIC has plans to dispose all food remaining in unit. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
